QF.id: VII Introduction to Securities Broking Operations_61

question.text: SEBI has allowed stock brokers to conduct IPV (In-Person Verification) through VIPV (Video In-Person Verification) using which medium?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI has allowed stock brokers to conduct VIPV of individual investors through their App. The process requires: authorized/trained official, live environment, random Q&A, Aadhaar photo match, secure/tamper-proof storage with date/time stamp. **The Trap:** VIPV is allowed via the broker's own App only — not through general video calling apps or social media. This ensures controlled, auditable verification. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VI covers IPV/VIPV for demat account opening. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** VIPV through broker app = scalable, remote client onboarding. But IPV exemptions exist: (1) Aadhaar authentication completed, (2) documents submitted via DigiLocker/verifiable online source. These exemptions make purely digital onboarding possible.
